name: autopilot
description: Autopilot implementation drain: turn an ADR / design doc / manifest-bearing Spec into an autonomous TDD task queue and drain it into PRs across self-scheduled fires — plan (disjoint file ownership + test gates) → implement (RED/GREEN commits per Subtask) → parallel multi-validator review → one draft PR per Story, flipped ready when the Story completes. Consumes the Verification Manifest (mode inference, Behavior-ID mapping, union + revision-drift gates), coordinates cross-drain via derived claim overlap, and shifts quality left (anti-flakiness contract, N=5 determinism gate). Host-agnostic through one adapter (scripts/host.sh — Bitbucket Data Center + GitHub); every behavioral claim proven by an executed self-test assertion or lint rule.
